project.name: YouNew
project.architecture: Hybrid SwiftUI MVVM-style view models with services, repository and typed routing

ai_assistant.effective_runtime: Local deterministic guided assistant over bundled/local knowledge
ai_assistant.retrieval: Local lexical retrieval; not vector RAG
ai_assistant.citations: Structured local source cards are implemented
ai_assistant.safest_demo: Local BSN to address to DigiD guided flow

repository.data_ci_scope: Workflow exists locally but is untracked
repository.secret_scan_result: No true secret confirmed by targeted current/history patterns

data_project_qa.scope: Temporary non-mutating snapshot of the current working tree

import_validation.scope: DataProject import validation in the temporary current-tree snapshot

data_project_structural_broken_relations.scope: Current cities import and DataProject structural validation; not a universal live-link claim

codex_evidence.evidence: Role-aware fallback, downsampling, bounded caching, actor coalescing, stale-UI suppression and readability policy
Vector map model and hit-testing tests
Governed records, manifests, imports, health and observability gates
Five-city manifest and deterministic import evidence
Unit, UI, accessibility, routing, media, content and release gates

verified_public_claims: YouNew is a SwiftUI iOS application for Netherlands newcomer information.
The local app identity is nl.younew.app version 1.1 build 5.
The current assistant is a deterministic local guided assistant over bundled/local knowledge.
The current assistant can be demonstrated without an API key or deployed backend.
The repository contains implementation and reports consistent with the documented Codex-assisted workflow.
The current dirty working tree completes a clean Debug simulator build.
The current unit suite is not green: 446 of 450 xcresult entries pass.
The current UI suite is not green: 80 of 86 tests pass.
A local cities-v0.1.0 manifest contains Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Den Haag, Utrecht and Eindhoven.
unverified_claims: The app currently performs live OpenAI inference.
The backend example is deployed or used by the effective runtime path.
The requested combined newcomer scenario is stable end to end.
A GitHub repository exists for the current state.
The repository is public or private.
A current TestFlight build is active.
A public App Store version is available.
All tests and static QA pass.
Codex authored specific source lines or commits.
The owner personally wrote application code.
